privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: How BeautyHub processes personal data when you use the platform.
privacy.updated: Last updated: June 2026 — draft for legal review.

1.title: Data controller
1.body: Institutes are controllers for their end customers. BeautyHub acts as processor.

2.title: Data collected
2.body: Identity, contact details, appointments, purchases, marketing preferences, access logs.

3.title: Purposes
3.body: Contract, booking, POS, support, security. Marketing: consent.

4.title: Recipients
4.body: See Sub-processors page. Data isolated per tenant (RLS).

5.title: Retention
5.body: Contract duration plus legal periods. Export and anonymization in product.

6.title: Your rights
6.body: Access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection. Contact your institute or supervisory authority.

7.title: Security
7.body: TLS, AES-256-GCM for secrets, authentication, audit logs. See /legal/securite.

1.title: Purpose
1.body: SaaS for beauty institutes (appointments, clients, POS).

2.title: Accounts
2.body: You are responsible for credentials and team access.

3.title: Data
3.body: Institute guarantees legal bases. BeautyHub processes on institute instructions.

5.title: IP
5.body: BeautyHub owns the software. Institute owns its data.

subprocessors.title: Sub-processors
subprocessors.intro: Technical sub-processors used by hosted BeautyHub.
subprocessors.note: Indicative list — update when adding providers.

security.title: Security & trust
security.intro: Documented technical measures. Not ISO 27001 or HIPAA certification.
security.roadmapBody:
Operational GDPR (legal pages, export, anonymization, consent, audit).
Next: pentest, public SLA, ISO 27001 (organization).
HIPAA: US medical segment only.

dpa.title: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
dpa.intro: Art. 28 GDPR template between your institute (controller) and BeautyHub (processor).

points.controller: Institute is controller for end customers.
points.processor: BeautyHub processes data only to provide the service.
points.signature: Download, complete and keep a signed copy.

dpa.disclaimer: Informational template — validate with legal counsel.
